name: anafpy
description: Romania's ANAF tax-authority services as MCP tools: e-Factura inbox/filing (UBL XML pass-through), e-Transport declarations (structured authoring), and the public no-auth registry lookups. Filing is two-step gated (prepare -> review -> submit). Requires uv, an ANAF OAuth app (ANAFPY_CLIENT_ID / ANAFPY_CLIENT_SECRET in the environment), and a one-time `anafpy auth login` in a terminal; the public lookups work without any of that.
